text: I mean if fifa was willing to allow American stadiums to host the games as intended, this would still he a shitshow but less so. text: The group all had draws, and each team scored one goal. Meaning all the goal differential tie breakers are at a draw. The tie breaker for Group B currently comes down to Switzerland advancing because they have the fewest number of red and yellow cards, and Canada advancing because they had the highest ranking in the last FIFA ranking table.
label: analysis
